title: rubus horridus
intro: Rubus horridus, also known as the thorny raspberry or bramble, is a type of woody plant that belongs to the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus horridus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Rubus horridus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
